title: Assertion hit in the MAL optimiser on a complex query
poc: SELECT (B IN (SELECT A1 FROM subt)) FROM t;
key_bug_features: Complex query with subquery in IN clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE subt (A1 BIGINT NOT NULL, A2 VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE t (B BIGINT, C FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO t (B, C) VALUES (1, 1.5), (2, NULL), (3, 3.5);
SELECT (B IN (SELECT A1 FROM subt WHERE A2 IS NOT NULL)) FROM t;
